spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the headline capability the spec promises: coarse tier 0–4 readout. Aligned with the chromestatus motivation.

interactive.rationale: Live interactive controls present and wired up — passes the no-static-card rule.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb on the feature index closely matches what the concept page delivers — title, lede, and interactive surface line up.

edge_cases.rationale: Happy path is solid and several failure modes are probed, but the page misses a couple of the edge cases the spec calls out (see open questions).

references.rationale: No see-also section and no chromestatus.com/feature link on this concept page; relies on the parent feature index for the canonical link. The self-heal script needs it embedded on every page.

design_system.rationale: Page uses CSS variables but also drops in raw hex literals (7 hex tokens) — the design-system rule is variables only, swap them for the matching --accent-* / --text-* tokens.

openQuestions.title: Add a fingerprinting probe panel: how much entropy do tier+hw+memory leak together?
openQuestions.detail: The privacy framing in the spec is the core motivation for exposing only a coarse tier. The harness should sum the entropy bits of the visible tier signals and contrast them with what a fingerprint vendor could already infer.

openQuestions.title: Embed the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link in this concept page
openQuestions.detail: The self-heal recovery script relies on every concept page carrying the canonical chromestatus link in a see-also or references block. Add it: https://chromestatus.com/feature/5189864286978048

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex colours with design-system tokens
openQuestions.detail: Inline styles in this concept use raw hex values where they should be pulling from --accent-blue / --accent-emerald / --accent-rose / --text-* / --bg-* defined in public/styles.css. Replace them to keep contrast and WCAG AA guarantees consistent across the showcase.

summary: 12 edge-case probes including hwConcurrency/deviceMemory companions, secure context, reduced-motion. Main gaps: Add a fingerprinting probe panel: how much entropy do tier+hw+memory leak together?; Embed the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link in this concept page; Replace raw hex colours with design-system tokens.
